title: Calendar: Subitems color should be different than parent-items
excerpt: I often find an issue where my Calendar subitems color (when colored by group) are the same as a different parent-item color. It would be fantastic if parent-child items were either different shades of the same color to …

posts.author: MaggieB (Maggie Boler)
posts.cookedHtml:
I often find an issue where my Calendar subitems color (when colored by group) are the same as a different parent-item color. It would be fantastic if parent-child items were either different shades of the same color to show correlation OR if simply the sub-item general level was NOT a color that is used for the parent-level task.

Screen Shot 2023-07-31 at 5.30.04 PM1618×788 282 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Maggie,

I see where you’re coming from here

Are you happy for me to convert this into a feature request to increase visibility and put greater emphasis on this need?

You can read more about our feature request process here: All you need to know about our feature request process!

posts.author: MaggieB (Maggie Boler)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Yes, please convert it to a feature request! Thank you
